content.description: Operational health for the WorkspaceOne / AirWatch on-prem stack: device check-ins, HTTP health on the WS1 console, top API endpoints, failing requests, Tunnel latency, and service-side errors.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>WorkspaceOne: Operations Overview</label>
    <description>Operational health for the WorkspaceOne / AirWatch on-prem stack: device check-ins, HTTP health on the WS1 console, top API endpoints, failing requests, Tunnel latency, and service-side errors.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{"title": "WorkspaceOne: Operations Overview", "description": "Operational health for the WorkspaceOne / AirWatch on-prem stack: device check-ins, HTTP health on the WS1 console, top API endpoints, failing requests, Tunnel latency, and service-side errors.", "inputs": {"input_global_trp": {"options": {"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "global_time"}, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}}}}, "visualizations": {"viz_kpi_events": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_kpi_events"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Events Ingested", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_kpi_devices": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_kpi_devices"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Distinct Devices", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_kpi_success": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_kpi_success"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "HTTP Success %", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_kpi_5xx": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_kpi_5xx"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "HTTP 5xx", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_volume_by_host": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_volume_by_host"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Events by Host", "type": "splunk.area"}, "viz_status_trend": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_status_trend"}, "options": {"stackMode": "stacked"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "HTTP Status (15-min buckets)", "type": "splunk.column"}, "viz_top_uri": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_top_uri"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Top API Endpoints (chatty group GETs collapsed)", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_fail_endpoints": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_fail_endpoints"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Top Failing Endpoints (status >= 400)", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_platform_mix": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_platform_mix"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Device Platform Mix (from User-Agent)", "type": "splunk.pie"}, "viz_tunnel_latency": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_tunnel_latency"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "WS1 Tunnel API Latency p95/p99 (ms)", "type": "splunk.line"}, "viz_service_errors": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_service_errors"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Service-Side Errors (top method \u00d7 sourcetype)", "type": "splunk.table"}}, "dataSources": {"ds_kpi_events": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_kpi_devices": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis deviceId=* | stats dc(deviceId) AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_kpi_success": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis status>0 | eval ok=if(status>=200 AND status<400,1,0) | stats sum(ok) AS ok count AS total | eval rate=if(total>0,round(ok/total*100,2),0) | table rate", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_kpi_5xx": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis status>=500 | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_volume_by_host": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch | timechart span=1h count by host", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_status_trend": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis | eval bucket=case(status>=500,\"5xx server error\",status>=400,\"4xx client error\",status>=300,\"3xx redirect\",status>=200,\"2xx success\",1=1,\"1xx/0\") | timechart span=15m count by bucket", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_top_uri": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis cs_uri_stem!=\"/\" | rex field=cs_uri_stem \"^(?<uri_norm>/api/system/groups/)[0-9a-f-]{36}.*\" | eval uri_show=coalesce(uri_norm,cs_uri_stem) | stats count by cs_method, uri_show | sort -count | head 15 | rename cs_method AS Method, uri_show AS URI, count AS Requests", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_fail_endpoints": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis status>=400 | stats count by status, cs_method, cs_uri_stem | sort -count | head 20 | rename status AS Status, cs_method AS Method, cs_uri_stem AS URI, count AS Count", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_platform_mix": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=iis deviceId=* cs_User_Agent!=\"-\" | eval platform=case(match(cs_User_Agent,\"(?i)Android\"),\"Android\",match(cs_User_Agent,\"(?i)iOS\"),\"iOS\",match(cs_User_Agent,\"Darwin\"),\"macOS\",match(cs_User_Agent,\"(?i)Windows\"),\"Windows\",match(cs_User_Agent,\"^MDM/\"),\"Apple (MDM protocol)\",match(cs_User_Agent,\"AppleExchangeWebServices\"),\"Apple (EWS)\",match(cs_User_Agent,\"(?i)Mozilla|Chrome|Safari|Firefox|Edge\"),\"Browser\",1=1,\"Other\") | stats count by platform | sort -count | rename platform AS Platform, count AS Count", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_tunnel_latency": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch sourcetype=*ws1.tunnel.kestrel* | spath path=\"context.elapsed\" output=elapsed_raw | rex field=elapsed_raw \"(?<elapsed_ms>\\d+)\" | eval elapsed_ms=tonumber(elapsed_ms) | where isnotnull(elapsed_ms) | timechart span=15m perc95(elapsed_ms) AS p95_ms perc99(elapsed_ms) AS p99_ms", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_service_errors": {"options": {"query": "index=airwatch (sourcetype=ComplianceService OR sourcetype=DeviceServicesLog-* OR sourcetype=AW.IntegrationService-* OR sourcetype=ChangeEventOutboundQueueService OR sourcetype=EntityReconcileService-* OR sourcetype=InterrogatorQueueService-* OR sourcetype=MessagingServiceLog-* OR sourcetype=VMware.UEM.DesiredStateManagement OR sourcetype=AirWatch.UEM.MetadataTransformService-*) | rex \"^\\d{4}/\\d{2}/\\d{2} \\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2}\\.\\d+\\t\\S+\\t\\S+\\t\\S+\\s+\\(\\s*\\d+\\s*\\)\\s+(?<level>\\S+)\\t(?<method>\\S+)\" | where level=\"Error\" | stats count AS errors by sourcetype, method | sort -errors | head 25 | rename sourcetype AS Sourcetype, method AS Method, errors AS Errors", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}}, "layout": {"globalInputs": ["input_global_trp"], "layoutDefinitions": {"layout_1": {"options": {"display": "auto", "height": 1660, "width": 2100}, "structure": [{"item": "viz_kpi_events", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 0, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_kpi_devices", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 520, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_kpi_success", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 1040, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_kpi_5xx", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 540, "x": 1560, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_volume_by_host", "position": {"h": 320, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 170}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_status_trend", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 500}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_top_uri", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 500}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_fail_endpoints", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 1390, "x": 0, "y": 890}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_platform_mix", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 700, "x": 1400, "y": 890}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_tunnel_latency", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 1280}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_service_errors", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 1280}, "type": "block"}], "type": "absolute"}}, "tabs": {"items": [{"label": "Operations", "layoutId": "layout_1"}]}}}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: WorkspaceOne: Operations Overview
